name: revolut
description: Bootstrap designer-ready React apps with the PDS design system.

interface.shortDescription: Start a Vite React app wired to PDS.
interface.longDescription: Bootstraps an empty folder into a Vite React TypeScript app, installs local PDS package tarballs, imports PDS styles, and renders a designer-ready starter surface.
defaultPrompt: Start a new PDS React app here
